caption: A person's hands hold a protective plastic card slab containing a sports card featuring a baseball player in a cap and jersey. The card has a purple border and a green signature across the player's image. In the background, a blurry desk area is visible with several boxes of trading cards and a white surface. A small inset video window in the lower right corner shows a man wearing a black t-shirt and a black baseball cap, sitting in front of a screen. This inset includes the logo "WINS PRO" and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". At the bottom of the main screen, the word "BREAK" is partially visible in large white letters. Across the sequence, the hands tilt the plastic slab, causing light to reflect off the surface and shifting the angle of the card's view.
